null_expectations.note: Expected exceedance fractions if the climate matched the 1991-2020 baseline. Counts above these are the anomaly signal; counts near them are the base rate.

validation.note: Searched Kashmir cold wave October 2025 / Sonamarg minimum temperature mid-October 2025: found an early-October (Oct 3-8) cold snap with no temperature figures, and dated Sonamarg readings (-5.8 to -12.5°C) only for Dec 2025-Jan 2026. Nothing for Oct 12 specifically; the numerically close -8.3°C press figure is from Jan 19, 2026 and was not stretched to cover this event.

Media India (Jan 2026): same Jan 22-23 storm — 'snowfall, avalanches strike Sonamarg', roads blocked, avalanche burying buildings/vehicles; consistent with a very heavy precipitation day (no separate mm measurement found).

Deccan Herald (Aug 31, 2025): 'rare late-summer weather event' — Sonamarg and Zojila 'received nearly a foot of snow'; residents worried about premature snow onset. Matches the flagged late-August unseasonal snow episode.

Kashmir InFocus (Jan 2026): heavy Western Disturbance hit J&K on the evening of Jan 22 with peak impact Jan 23; Sonamarg recorded 'heavy snowfall of over two feet', avalanches, stranded vehicles, road closed by authorities.

Outlook India: higher reaches of Kashmir received snowfall on Dec 21, 2025 at the start of Chillai-Kalan; officials confirmed ongoing snowfall at Sonamarg that day; ~2-8 inches at Gulmarg, 6 inches at Sadhna Top.
